nasb.text: “The bricks have fallen down, But we will rebuild with smooth stones; The sycamores have been cut down, But we will replace them with cedars.”

esv.text: “The bricks have fallen, but we will build with dressed stones; the sycamores have been cut down, but we will put cedars in their place.”

cnv.text: “磚牆倒塌了， 我們就用鑿好的石頭來建築； 桑樹砍倒了， 我們就用香柏樹替換。”

ccb.text: “砖墙倒塌了， 我们可以凿石重建； 桑树砍倒了， 我们可以再种香柏树。”

csbs.text: “砖头坠落了， 我们就用凿好的石头重建； 桑树砍倒了， 我们就用香柏树更换！”
